spec_source: 提示词/mrna的 rl 的后续优化的分阶段提示词.md L562-800

acceptance_criteria.detail: p3_task_v2; task_name=source_conditioned_minimal_edit_protein_output; primary_endpoint=protein_output; active_task=task_a with operational allowed={five_utr_substitution} only; task_b registered frozen_fallback with {synonymous_cds_substitution}; forbidden includes nonsynonymous CDS, CDS/UTR indels, three_utr_edit; edit_budgets={1,3,5,10}; 6 hard constraints incl. motif_policy_v1_hard_forbidden; three_utr_status=locked_extension

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Task A/B/C/D 完成证据评分
acceptance_criteria.detail: 9 dimensions scored 1-5 from landscape evidence (16 studies); totals corrected by P3-00A to A=41, B=29, C=29, D=21 out of 45 (per-dimension scores unchanged; previously mis-summed 36/30/29/21)

active_primary = Task A (5'UTR-only); frozen_fallback = Task B (CDS-only synonymous), activation requires amendment; Task C locked_extension, unlock requires H1+H2+H3 pass in BOTH five_utr and cds scopes; Task D rejected_for_primary_paper, hard-floor ineligible

H1-H6 each carry supporting/opposing evidence, validation experiment, minimum effect size, statistical method, and GO/PARTIAL/NO-GO conditions; thresholds frozen 2026-07-22 pre-data; all six remain scientific_validation_status=PENDING

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 明确什么结果会导致暂停 RL
acceptance_criteria.detail: 5 explicit pause triggers: H1 NO-GO, H2 NO-GO, H3 NO-GO, H4 NO-GO (Route C), adversarial reward hacking; recovery requires new evidence plus a fresh gate, never threshold edits

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 不再把 full-transcript synergy 当成默认前提
acceptance_criteria.detail: 7 defaults explicitly rejected; H5/H6 demoted to optional unlock hypotheses; three_utr_status=locked_extension in frozen contract

p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.detail: paper_primary_method scope = {full_length_mrna_modeling, protein_conditioned_cds_generation, region_infilling, source_conditioned_editing}; application_tasks A/B/C/D = active_primary/frozen_fallback/locked_extension/rejected_for_primary_paper; active Task A 的合法动作不含任何 CDS action

p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.criterion: 最终冻结合同文件生成
p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.detail: Base Model 研究完整 mRNA 异质状态空间；Task A 是第一项应用任务而非全部方法范围；Generic FlexFlow-mRNA 登记为 closest baseline；RL 不是 paper blocker；3'UTR 与 synergy 必须过 gate；后续路线只能经 amendment 修改

p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.criterion: phase 完成与科学验证分离
p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.evidence: all gate files (2 configs, 5 docs, TSV header, this matrix)
p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.detail: phase_status=PASS 与 scientific_validation_status=PENDING 同时出现；禁止用 P3-00 PASS 暗示 H1-H6 已得到实验证明

hard-floor eligibility: D ineligible; LOCO: A first in 9/9 scenarios; alternative weights: A first in 5/5 schemes; B/C tie at 29 recorded, not hidden; resolved by governance (fallback activation order), not re-scoring
motif_policy_v1 三层: hard_forbidden (action space 排除，非 reward penalty), guarded_risk (oracle/reviewer 追踪), soft_objective (仅 reward shaping); unversioned no_forbidden_motif 已移除；并非所有 motif 风险都是普适硬约束

p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.criterion: 契约测试覆盖任务6全部10项并全绿
p3_00a_acceptance_criteria.detail: 37 tests: Task A only 5'UTR; Task B only synonymous CDS; Task C default locked; Task C unlock = H1/H2/H3 in both regions; method covers full mRNA grammar flow; phase PASS + scientific PENDING coexist; Generic FlexFlow-mRNA registered; motif policy versioned; hashes match; canonical-newline and relative-path independence

task_scores.scale: 1-5 per dimension, 5 = most favourable; reward-hacking risk scored as favourability (5 = low risk)

robustness.ranking_instability: B/C tie at 29 swaps under LOCO and weighting; affects fallback ordering only, never the preferred task; recorded, not hidden

task_decision.frozen_fallback: Task B (CDS-only synonymous); activates only via amendment if Task A fails H1/H2 while CDS passes
task_decision.locked_extension: Task C (5'UTR+CDS joint); unlock requires H1, H2 and H3 each passed in BOTH five_utr and cds scopes (6 conditions in configs/p3_primary_task.yaml application_tasks.task_c.unlock_requires)
task_decision.rejected_for_primary_paper: Task D (full-transcript); hard-floor ineligible; three_utr_status stays locked_extension, unlock per H6 only

closest_baseline.name: generic_flexflow_mrna
closest_baseline.rule: all matched-budget comparisons must include Generic FlexFlow-mRNA before any external baseline

H1_local_effect_existence.no_go_action: pause all RL; acquire Level-C intervention data

H2_local_delta_predictability.key_thresholds: sign accuracy >=0.60 and >0.50 (binomial, FDR<0.05); top-10% enrichment >=1.5x; delta Spearman >=0.30 on family-disjoint test

H3_optimization_headroom.no_go_action: pause all RL; improve oracles first
H3_optimization_headroom.key_thresholds: >=30% sources with independent-oracle-confirmed positive candidate; median best-candidate gain >=5% predicted proxy; robust to GC/length controls

H4_rl_quality_amortization_value.no_go_action: stop GRPO expansion (Route C); no-RL paper route
H4_rl_quality_amortization_value.key_thresholds: H4-A: >=5% over best search at 512-query budget, paired bootstrap CI excludes 0, >=3 seeds; H4-B: within 2% quality, >=10x fewer inference calls

H5_cross_region_synergy.no_go_action: drop synergy narrative; core paper unaffected
H5_cross_region_synergy.key_thresholds: interaction |d| >= 0.2 consistent across >=2 independent oracles + prospective arm

H6_full_transcript_extension_value.key_thresholds: 3'UTR delta oracle meets H2 thresholds; >=5% held-out gain over Task C policy

rl_pause_conditions: H1 NO-GO: best edits indistinguishable from matched random edits
H2 NO-GO: sign accuracy ~ random / no enrichment / independent-oracle reversal
H3 NO-GO: strong search cannot beat source on independent oracle
H4 NO-GO (Route C): ranker + limited search near-optimal, no RL advantage
P3-03/P3-09 adversarial high-training-reward candidates fail prospectively (reward hacking)
minimum_publishable_unit: at least one prospective assay (C5 for assayed panel only)
hash_note: digests are SHA-256 over newline-canonicalized bytes (CRLF normalized to LF); paths resolve against the repo root, so caller cwd does not affect verification
unresolved_risks: Task A headroom may not transfer from reporter-MPRA oracles to natural source UTRs (Sample 2019 is fixed 50 nt random library, OOD vs natural 5'UTRs)
No source-matched local-edit labels exist yet for CDS synonymous substitutions; H1/H2 for CDS may fail and force Task B fallback or Level-C data acquisition
PERSIST-seq is only 233 sequences; full-length multi-endpoint supervision is thin
Landscape rows for preprint methods (mRNA-GPT, ProMORNA, mRNAutilus, RiboNN) carry version/license uncertainty; numbers to be re-verified at citation time
B/C tie at 29 is ranking instability at the fallback level; if Task A fails H1/H2, governance (amendment order), not score, decides B-before-C
next_phase: P3-01: local-intervention data and benchmark freeze (no GRPO training)
